data.title: BTTC 2.0 governance system is fully upgraded
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, BTTC 2.0, a cross-chain infrastructure under TRON, announced that it will fully upgrade its governance system. It is reported that BTTC 2.0 has built an open, transparent and fair cross-chain ecosystem through an innovative pluggable governance architecture and validator collaboration mechanism. This upgrade will bring a new standard of open and transparent governance to the industry. More technical details will be disclosed in the near future.

data.title: Impact of Singapore's DTSP Act on Crypto Users Discussed
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the recent introduction of Singapore's DTSP Act has raised concerns among local cryptocurrency users regarding its potential impact. A discussion titled "End of Web3 Paradise? The Real Impact of Singapore's DTSP Act" will be held at 19:00 UTC+8. The event will feature Matrixport's Chief Compliance Officer Christopher Liu, EX.IO CEO Chen Wu, ArkStream Capital's Founding Partner Ye Su, and Herring Global's BD Director Valentina. The panel aims to explore the deep implications of the legislation on the crypto community.

data.title: Hong Kong SFC Proposes Restrictions on Misleading Institutional Names
data.description: According to Odaily, the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has initiated a consultation aimed at curbing the misuse of names by unregulated entities, which may lead the public to mistakenly believe they are regulated institutions. In response to recent developments, the SFC proposes expanding the current list of restricted titles under the Securities and Futures Ordinance. The proposed changes would extend restrictions to commonly used terms implying 'exchange' and words referring to financial products and platforms regulated by the ordinance. The recommendations also cover titles that might suggest an affiliation with existing exchanges, virtual asset trading platforms, and similar institutions.

data.description:
The retailer is raising $1. 75 billion, and one possible use of those funds? Buying Bitcoin. That’s the kind of move that might’ve thrilled the market a year ago

data.title: Hong Kong SFC proposes further restrictions on the use of misleading names to enhance investor protection
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - The Securities and Futures Commission of Hong Kong launched a consultation today to restrict unregulated institutions from improperly adopting names that cause the public to mistakenly believe that they are regulated institutions. In this regard, in line with recent developments, the SFC proposed to expand the existing list of restricted titles under the Securities and Futures Ordinance. In addition, the proposal will extend the scope of restrictions to common words with similar meanings to "exchanges" and words that refer to certain financial products and platforms regulated by the Securities and Futures Ordinance. The proposal will also cover titles that may imply an association with existing exchanges, virtual asset trading platforms and other similar institutions. (Jinshi)

data.title: Institutions Now Hold 31% of All Bitcoin, Gemini Warns of Centralization Risks
data.description:

The post Institutions Now Hold 31% of All Bitcoin, Gemini Warns of Centralization Risks first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/06/12/bitcoin-treasuries-hold-31-of-supply/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=bitcoin-treasuries-hold-31-of-supply

data.title: Ant Financial starts applying for Hong Kong stablecoin license
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Ant Group Vice President and Ant Digital Blockchain Business President Bian Zhuoqun revealed in an interview with reporters today that Ant Digital has started to apply for a Hong Kong stablecoin license and has had multiple rounds of communication with regulators. It is reported that Ant Digital has listed Hong Kong as its global headquarters this year and has completed the pilot test of the regulatory sandbox in Hong Kong.
Bian Zhuoqun made the above statement at the SNEC Shanghai Photovoltaic Exhibition on June 12. On the same day, Ant Digital and GCL Energy jointly announced the establishment of a new company "Ant Xinneng".
Bian Zhuoqun said that stablecoins, as a bridge connecting traditional finance and tokenized assets, have broad market potential. Its core value lies in the expansion of usage scenarios and compliance construction. Ant Digital, starting from industry and technology, is committed to building digital transaction scenarios based on stablecoins and promoting the development of new asset categories with technology as the core of the industry. At the same time, Ant Digital provides new incremental markets for stablecoin transactions and improves transaction efficiency and liquidity by providing safe, reliable and compliant infrastructure.

data.title: Japanese fashion brand ANAP increased its holdings of 27.5031 bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to more than 153 bitcoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Japanese fashion brand ANAP increased its holdings of 27.5031 bitcoins. After this increase, the total holdings reached 153.4627 bitcoins.

data.title: Bloomberg: Tencent plans to acquire Nexon, the developer of DNF and MapleStory
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bloomberg News quoted people familiar with the matter as saying that Tencent Holdings Ltd. is studying a potential deal to acquire South Korean game company Nexon and has contacted the family of Nexon's late founder Kim Jong-joo to discuss the possibility of an acquisition. It is reported that the Kim family is discussing with consultants and evaluating various options. People familiar with the matter said that it is unclear how willing NXC is to sell its stake in Nexon, and there is no guarantee that Tencent's negotiations will lead to a deal, and the specific transaction structure has not yet been finalized. Tencent representatives did not respond to requests for comment, and both Nexon and NXC declined to comment. It is reported that Nexon, which is famous for role-playing games such as "MapleStory", was founded in 1994 and completed the largest technology IPO in Japan at the time in 2011. Its Tokyo-listed shares have risen by more than 10% this year, with a market value of approximately US$15 billion. Tencent tried unsuccessfully to acquire Nexon in 2019. The two had jointly developed Tencent's important revenue-generating game "Dungeon & Fighter".

data.title: SEC Blocks $1B Solana Investment Plan Over Missing Paperwork
data.description:

Solana was selected due to its position as the sixth-largest cryptocurrency by market cap and its growing relevance in the DeFi ecosystem
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/sec-blocks-1b-solana-investment-plan-over-missing-paperwork/

data.title: CMC Altcoin Season Index Stands at 30
data.description: According to CoinMarketCap (CMC) data, the CMC Altcoin Season Index currently stands at 30. The index measures market performance by analyzing the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization to determine whether the market is shifting towards altcoins or Bitcoin dominance.

data.title: AguilaTrades Completes BTC TWAP Strategy Reduction
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on-chain data analyst Yu Jin has reported that AguilaTrades has completed the execution of its 1000 BTC TWAP strategy reduction. The firm's long position in Bitcoin has decreased from 3956 BTC to 2956 BTC, with the position value dropping from $434 million to $318 million.

AguilaTrades has incurred an unrealized loss of $3.96 million from this BTC long position. Currently, the firm holds a 20x leveraged long position on 2956 BTC, valued at $318 million. The opening price was $108,638, with a liquidation price set at $100,755.
